# Notify API

> Self-hosted notification gateway. Send alerts to Telegram and Email via REST API.

## API

Base: http://<host>:9009

GET /health → {"status":"ok","channels":{"telegram":bool,"email":bool}}

POST /notify/telegram
Body: {"title":"str","message":"str","level":"info|warning|critical","source":"str"}
Response: {"ok":bool,"channels":{"telegram":bool},"errors":{}}

POST /notify/email
Body: {"title":"str","subject":"str (alias)","message":"str","level":"info|warning|critical","source":"str","to":"str"}

POST /notify
Body: {"channel":"telegram|email|all","title":"str","message":"str","level":"info|warning|critical","source":"str"}

## MCP Server

Tools: notify_health, notify_send_telegram, notify_send_email, notify_send
Setup: uv run --directory /path/to/notify-api mcp_server.py (stdio transport)
Env: NOTIFY_API_URL=http://<host>:9009

## Quick Use

curl -X POST http://<host>:9009/notify/telegram -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"Alert","message":"Details here","level":"warning","source":"my-service"}'

## Setup

git clone https://github.com/BAEM1N/notify-api.git && cd notify-api
cp .env.example .env  # add TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID
docker compose up -d

Email sender routing:
- source contains ddok.ai → ddok sender profile
- source contains baeum.ai.kr/baeum.io.kr/baeum.ai → baeum sender profile

## Docs

- Full docs: https://github.com/BAEM1N/notify-api/blob/main/README.md
- Agent guide: https://github.com/BAEM1N/notify-api/blob/main/AGENTS.md
